Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Show HN: TurboQuant-WASM – Google's vector quantization in the browser 147 upvotes, 6 comments
  2. Ruckus: Racket for iOS 109 upvotes, 9 comments
  3. Show HN: I made open source, zero power PCB hackathon badges 73 upvotes, 8 comments
  4. OpenScreen is an open-source alternative to Screen Studio 170 upvotes, 28 comments
  5. Show HN: A game where you build a GPU 595 upvotes, 144 comments
  6. Show HN: M. C. Escher spiral in WebGL inspired by 3Blue1Brown 46 upvotes, 6 comments
  7. The Indie Internet Index – submit your favorite sites 119 upvotes, 24 comments
  8. Breaking Enigma with Index of Coincidence on a Commodore 64 33 upvotes, 4 comments
  9. AWS engineer reports PostgreSQL perf halved by Linux 7.0, fix may not be easy 180 upvotes, 44 comments
  10. Show HN: Contrapunk – Real-time counterpoint harmony from guitar input, in Rust 30 upvotes, 4 comments
  11. LLM Wiki – example of an "idea file" 120 upvotes, 30 comments
  12. Advice to young people, the lies I tell myself (2024) 79 upvotes, 21 comments
  13. Introduction to Computer Music [pdf] 87 upvotes, 24 comments
  14. Components of a Coding Agent 201 upvotes, 67 comments
  15. Apple approves driver that lets Nvidia eGPUs work with Arm Macs 400 upvotes, 176 comments
  16. Rubysyn: Clarifying Ruby's Syntax and Semantics 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  17. How many products does Microsoft have named 'Copilot'? 505 upvotes, 250 comments
  18. AI that copied musical artist files copyright claim against that artist 36 upvotes, 11 comments
  19. I used AI. It worked. I hated it 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  20. Show HN: sllm – Split a GPU node with other developers, unlimited tokens 138 upvotes, 70 comments
  21. Show HN: I built a small app for FSI German Course 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  22. The CMS is dead, long live the CMS 131 upvotes, 78 comments
  23. A case study in testing with 100+ Claude agents in parallel 39 upvotes, 24 comments
  24. German implementation of eIDAS will require an Apple/Google account to function 61 upvotes, 47 comments
  25. Writing Lisp is AI resistant and I'm sad 53 upvotes, 42 comments
  26. Emotion concepts and their function in a large language model 164 upvotes, 166 comments
  27. Electrical transformer manufacturing is throttling the electrified future 67 upvotes, 60 comments
  28. Applying machine learning to identify unrecognized Covid-19 deaths in the US 4 upvotes, 1 comments
  29. What if the browser built the UI for you? 15 upvotes, 12 comments
  30. Zml-smi: universal monitoring tool for GPUs, TPUs and NPUs 5 upvotes, 2 comments

Last generated 1:30pm, 5 April 2026. Source here.
